title: fix(mistral): route to Azure Foundry mistral-small-2503
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A fresh breeze for Mistral
gist.blurb: Mistral was taking too many naps on its old server, so we packed its bags and moved it to Azure. It's now wide awake and responding in milliseconds.
gist.summary: Rerouted Mistral Small requests to a new Azure Foundry deployment to eliminate recent gateway timeouts.
gist.impact: Mistral text generations are back to being lightning fast and highly reliable.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot moving a glowing wind/cloud symbol (representing Mistral) into a shiny new, fast server rack.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot carefully placing a glowing blue cloud into a shiny new lime green (#ecf874) server rack. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
